info.title: Adjudication Agent
info.description: Applies benefit rules to validated claims — checks coverage, compares billed vs allowed amount, enforces prior authorisation, and routes to APPROVED, REJECTED, or PENDING_REVIEW.

post.summary: Submit a message to the Adjudication Agent

example.message: Adjudicate claim CLM-A001 for member M-1001 on plan PLAN-GOLD, procedure 99213, billed $130
Claim CLM-A001 is APPROVED. Procedure 99213 is covered under PLAN-GOLD with an allowed amount of $150. Billed amount $130 is within limit. No prior authorisation required.

message.description: Natural language message to the agent describing the claim to adjudicate.

sessionId.description: Optional session identifier for multi-turn conversations.

message.description: Agent's natural language response including adjudication decision (APPROVED / REJECTED / PENDING_REVIEW) and rationale.
